title: lannea schimperi var. glabrescens
intro: Lannea schimperi var. glabrescens, also known as the glabrous Lannea, is a plant species belonging to the Anacardiaceae family. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as possessing potential antidiabetic properties. Herbal preparations of Lannea schimperi var. glabrescens can be used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
